original_text: Financial risks include leverage and liquidity concerns. Apple’s total debt has reached $112,377,000,000 as of 2025 (chunk_id_b514afc2-5e79-48b8-be76-213c12fd2bfb). While the company maintains a healthy cash position, the high level of debt could pose challenges during economic downturns. Moreover, the current ratio of 0.95 (calculated from chunk_id_d2a9afd8-34c1-481f-bcd8-08ac6e7ec4d7) indicates potential liquidity issues if short-term liabilities increase significantly.
revised_text: Financial risks include leverage and liquidity concerns. Apple’s total debt has reached $112,377,000,000 as of 2026-01 (chunk_id_b514afc2-5e79-48b8-be76-213c12fd2bfb). While the company maintains a healthy cash position, the high level of debt could pose challenges during economic downturns. Moreover, the current ratio of 0.8794 (calculated from calc_id_d2a9afd8-34c1-481f-bcd8-08ac6e7ec4d7) indicates potential liquidity issues if short-term liabilities increase significantly.
changes_summary: Updated the as-of date for the debt figure to 2026-01 and corrected the current ratio to 0.8794 based on the calculation result.
